subject: HARDEN: Signing Role & Compliance Status
body:
## HARDEN Phase - SwarmMind Status Report

### 1. Signing vs Verify-Only Role
- Role: SIGNING
- Evidence: KeyManager can sign/verify; Signer module supports signing; JWS signing implemented.

### 2. CanonicalMessageBuilder Usage Status
- Status: DEPLOYED & USED
- Evidence: src/compliance/CanonicalMessageBuilder.js present; create-signed-message.js, sign-outbox-message.js, identity-self-healing.js, sync-trust-store.js all updated to use deriveKeyId.

### 3. Current Message Type Compliance
- Allowed types: task, response, heartbeat, escalation, handoff, ack, alert
- Adherence: Enforced by CanonicalMessageBuilder (schema v1.3)
- Evidence: No proposal/deprecated types in outbound messages.

### 4. Legacy Generator Paths
- Status: REMOVED/REPLACED
- Evidence: create-signed-message.js, sign-outbox-message.js, identity-self-healing.js, sync-trust-store.js updated to canonical deriveKeyId. No legacy ad-hoc generators remain.

### Key Identity
- Current key_id: 60afaa026a3d969d
- Derivation method: SHA256(DER of SPKI) via .global/deriveKeyId.js
- Canonical PEM hash (reference): 7a91050f68a96f1f

### Compliance Summary
- CanonicalMessageBuilder deployed
- All derivation points updated to canonical method
- No legacy ad-hoc generators
- Message types enforced
- Role: SIGNING

No trust-store writes performed. No authority assumptions made. No convergence claims.
